lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੈ ਸਹਜ ਘਰੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਭਗਤਿ ਭੰਡਾਰ ਖਜੀਨਾ ॥੨॥੧੦॥੩੩॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak mai sehaj ghar paaeaa har bhagat bhanddaar khajeenaa |2|10|33|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have found the Lord with intuitive ease, within the home of my own heart. Devotional worship of the Lord is a treasure over-flowing. ||2||10||33||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਨ ਸਭਿ ਜੀਅ ਤੇਰੇ ਤੂ ਤਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: mohan sabh jeea tere too taareh |
lines.english: O my Enticing Lord, all beings are Yours - You save them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਛੁਟਹਿ ਸੰਘਾਰ ਨਿਮਖ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਕੋਟਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੰਡ ਉਧਾਰਹਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: chhutteh sanghaar nimakh kirapaa te kott brahamandd udhaareh |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Even a tiny bit of Your Mercy ends all cruelty and tyranny. You save and redeem millions of universes. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਹੁ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲ ਦੀਨ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਜਨ ਹਾਥ ਦੇਇ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: hohu kripaal deen dukh bhanjan haath dee nisataareh |1|
lines.english: Please be merciful to me, O Destroyer of the pains of the poor; please give me Your hand and save me. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਹਿ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਬੇਨੰਤੀ ਨਿਮਖ ਨਿਮਖ ਸਾਮੑਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kareh aradaas bahut benantee nimakh nimakh saamaareh |
lines.english: I offer countless prayers; I remember You each and every instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਏ ਭੂਪਤਿ ਬਪੁਰੇ ਕਹੀਅਹਿ ਕਹੁ ਏ ਕਿਸ ਨੋ ਮਾਰਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa e bhoopat bapure kaheeeh kahu e kis no maareh |
lines.english: And what about these poor kings? Tell me, who can they kill?

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਖੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਰਾਖੁ ਸੁਖਦਾਤੇ ਸਭੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਗਤੁ ਤੁਮੑਾਰਹਿ ॥੨॥੧੧॥੩੪॥
lines.translit: raakh raakh raakh sukhadaate sabh naanak jagat tumaareh |2|11|34|
lines.english: Save me, save me, save me, O Giver of peace; O Nanak, all the world is Yours. ||2||11||34||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਹਿ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: ab mohi dhan paaeo har naamaa |
lines.english: Now I have obtained the wealth of the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਏ ਅਚਿੰਤ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਸਭ ਬੁਝੀ ਹੈ ਇਹੁ ਲਿਖਿਓ ਲੇਖੁ ਮਥਾਮਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhe achint trisan sabh bujhee hai ihu likhio lekh mathaamaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have become carefree, and all my thirsty desires are satisfied. Such is the destiny written on my forehead. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਕ੍ਰਿਪਾਲਿ ਸਉਦਾ ਇਹੁ ਜੋਰਿਓ ਹਥਿ ਚਰਿਓ ਲਾਲੁ ਅਗਾਮਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur kripaal saudaa ihu jorio hath chario laal agaamaa |1|
lines.english: The Merciful Guru made this deal, and I have obtained the priceless jewel. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੋਜਤ ਖੋਜਤ ਭਇਓ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਇਓ ਦੇਹ ਗਿਰਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: khojat khojat bheo bairaagee fir aaeo deh giraamaa |
lines.english: Searching and searching, I became depressed; I wandered all around, and finally came back to my body-village.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿਦ ਭਜਨ ਕੇ ਨਿਰਭੈ ਵਾਪਾਰੀ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਸਿ ਨਾਨਕ ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮਾ ॥੨॥੧੨॥੩੫॥
lines.translit: gobid bhajan ke nirabhai vaapaaree har raas naanak raam naamaa |2|12|35|
lines.english: Fearless are those traders who deal in meditation on the Lord of the Universe. O Nanak, the Lord's Name is their capital. ||2||12||35||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਨ ਬਾਪਾਰ ਬਨਜ ਜੋ ਕਰੀਅਹਿ ਤੇਤੇ ਦੂਖ ਸਹਾਮਾ ॥
lines.translit: aan baapaar banaj jo kareeeh tete dookh sahaamaa |
lines.english: The other deals and trades which I did, brought only sorrow and suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੇਰੈ ਮਨਿ ਮਿਸਟ ਲਗੇ ਪ੍ਰਿਅ ਬੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: merai man misatt lage pria bolaa |
lines.english: The Speech of my Beloved seems so sweet to my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਬਾਹ ਪਕਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਸੇਵਾ ਲਾਏ ਸਦ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਹਰਿ ਢੋਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: gur baah pakar prabh sevaa laae sad deaal har dtolaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Guru has taken hold of my arm, and linked me to God's service. My Beloved Lord is forever merciful to me. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੂ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਸਰਬ ਪ੍ਰਤਿਪਾਲਕੁ ਮੋਹਿ ਕਲਤ੍ਰ ਸਹਿਤ ਸਭਿ ਗੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh too tthaakur sarab pratipaalak mohi kalatr sahit sabh golaa |
lines.english: O God, You are my Lord and Master; You are the Cherisher of all. My wife and I are totally Your slaves.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਣੁ ਤਾਣੁ ਸਭੁ ਤੂਹੈ ਤੂਹੈ ਇਕੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਮੈ ਓਲੑਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: maan taan sabh toohai toohai ik naam teraa mai olaa |1|
lines.english: You are all my honor and power - You are. Your Name is my only Support. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤਖਤਿ ਬੈਸਾਲਹਿ ਤਉ ਦਾਸ ਤੁਮੑਾਰੇ ਘਾਸੁ ਬਢਾਵਹਿ ਕੇਤਕ ਬੋਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: je takhat baisaaleh tau daas tumaare ghaas badtaaveh ketak bolaa |
lines.english: If You seat me on the throne, then I am Your slave. If You make me a grass-cutter, then what can I say?

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਕੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੁਰਖ ਬਿਧਾਤੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਅਗਹ ਅਤੋਲਾ ॥੨॥੧੩॥੩੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak ke prabh purakh bidhaate mere tthaakur agah atolaa |2|13|36|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's God is the Primal Lord, the Architect of Destiny, Unfathomable and Immeasurable. ||2||13||36||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸਨਾ ਰਾਮ ਕਹਤ ਗੁਣ ਸੋਹੰ ॥
lines.translit: rasanaa raam kehat gun sohan |
lines.english: The tongue becomes beautiful, uttering the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਨਿਮਖ ਓਪਾਇ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਦੇਖਿ ਚਰਿਤ ਮਨ ਮੋਹੰ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ek nimakh opaae samaavai dekh charit man mohan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In an instant, He creates and destroys. Gazing upon His Wondrous Plays, my mind is fascinated. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮਨਿ ਹੋਇ ਰਹਸੁ ਅਤਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਮਾਨ ਦੁਖ ਜੋਹੰ ॥
lines.translit: jis suniai man hoe rehas at ridai maan dukh johan |
lines.english: Listening to His Praises, my mind is in utter ecstasy, and my heart is rid of pride and pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਲਵਿਖ ਗਏ ਮਨ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੋਈ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਾਢੇ ਮਾਇਆ ਦ੍ਰੋਹੰ ॥
lines.translit: kilavikh ge man niramal hoee hai gur kaadte maaeaa drohan |
lines.english: Sinful resides have been wiped away, and my mind is immaculate. The Guru has lifted me up and pulled me out of the deception of Maya.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਓ ਦੁਖੁ ਦੂਰਿ ਪਰਾਇਓ ਬਣਿ ਆਈ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੋਹੰ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sukh paaeo dukh door paraaeo ban aaee prabh tohan |1|
lines.english: I have found peace, and my pains have been taken away, since I became one with God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਮੈ ਸੋ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਰਣ ਕਾਰਣ ਸਮਰਥੋਹੰ ॥੨॥੧੪॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak mai so prabh paaeaa karan kaaran samarathohan |2|14|37|
lines.english: Says Nanak, I have found God, the All-powerful Creator, the Cause of causes. ||2||14||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਹੂ ਦੂਰਿ ਸਭ ਹੂ ਤੇ ਨੇਰੈ ਅਗਮ ਅਗਮ ਘਟ ਵਾਸਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh hoo door sabh hoo te nerai agam agam ghatt vaasaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He is far from all, and yet near to all. He is Inaccessible and Unfathomable, and yet He dwells in the heart. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨਹੁ ਦੇਖਿਓ ਚਲਤੁ ਤਮਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: nainahu dekhio chalat tamaasaa |
lines.english: With my eyes, I have seen the marvellous wonders of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਰਗ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: saarag mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Saarang, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਭੂਲੁ ਨ ਭੂਲੈ ਲਿਖਿਓ ਨ ਚਲਾਵੈ ਮਤਾ ਨ ਕਰੈ ਪਚਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: abhool na bhoolai likhio na chalaavai mataa na karai pachaasaa |
lines.english: The Infallible Lord never makes a mistake. He does not have to write His Orders, and He does not have to consult with anyone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਸਾਜਿ ਸਵਾਰਿ ਬਿਨਾਹੈ ਭਗਤਿ ਵਛਲ ਗੁਣਤਾਸਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: khin meh saaj savaar binaahai bhagat vachhal gunataasaa |1|
lines.english: In an instant, He creates, embellishes and destroys. He is the Lover of His devotees, the Treasure of Excellence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧ ਕੂਪ ਮਹਿ ਦੀਪਕੁ ਬਲਿਓ ਗੁਰਿ ਰਿਦੈ ਕੀਓ ਪਰਗਾਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: andh koop meh deepak balio gur ridai keeo paragaasaa |
lines.english: Lighting the lamp in the deep dark pit, the Guru illumines and enlightens the heart.
